chunks.text: On my way home, I was walking through the town.
Though I was tired, my steps felt light.
Passing through a narrow alley and crossing a small plaza
I felt the atmosphere of the town.
The street lamps cast gentle shadows, and I walked gently.
Leaving the butcher district, I saw the bakery sign glowing.
A rich scent drifted out, and my mood began to improve.
Near home, I happened upon an old friend.
Seeing me, he waved and laughed.
The encounter was an unexpected joy.
Exchanging a few words with him, I felt the day's tiredness vanish completely.
Walking through the town, the small delight of daily life embraced me quietly.
